name: lsjm-scam-platform
description: LSJM - Let Scams Just Miss, explainable AI platform for scam risk evaluation

scripts.copy-shared: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('shared/css/ui.css','extension/shared-ui.css')" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='extension/images'; if(!fs.existsSync(p))fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true}); ['shieldy-calm','shieldy-suspicious','shieldy-alert','shieldy-danger'].forEach(s=>fs.copyFileSync('shared/images/'+s+'.png', p+'/'+s+'.png'))"
